narrative:
Gibsonburg Ex Vill Sd (Sandusky) exempted village school district has 3,364 registered voters, with 53.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 16.7 percentage points.
